news.title:
CSK's unlisted shares surged 25-40%, driven by IPL franchise sales like RCB's $1.78B and RR's $1.63B deals.
CSK's FY25 revenue hit ₹643Cr, PAT ₹180Cr; Sun TV and RPSG Ventures also saw stock gains of 5.4% and 20%.
news.summary:
CSK's unlisted shares surged 25-40%, driven by IPL franchise sales like RCB's $1.78B and RR's $1.63B deals.
CSK's FY25 revenue hit ₹643Cr, PAT ₹180Cr; Sun TV and RPSG Ventures also saw stock gains of 5.4% and 20%.

news.title:
United Spirits sold IPL franchise RCB for ₹16,600 crore; shares set to react.
RCB sale highlights Sun TV (Sunrisers Hyderabad) and RPSG Ventures (Lucknow Supergiants).
news.summary:
United Spirits sold IPL franchise RCB for ₹16,600 crore; shares set to react.
RCB sale highlights Sun TV (Sunrisers Hyderabad) and RPSG Ventures (Lucknow Supergiants).

news.title:
Sun TV Network executed a block trade of ~402,254 shares at Rs. 600.4.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 24.15 crores.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network executed a block trade of ~402,254 shares at Rs. 600.4.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 24.15 crores.

news.title: SUN TV Network declares interim dividend of ₹1.25/share.
news.summary: SUN TV Network declares interim dividend of ₹1.25/share.

news.title:
Sun TV Network Ltd sets March 12, 2026, as the record date for 4th interim dividend FY 2025-26.
Dividend payment, if declared, will occur within 30 days as per Companies Act provisions.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network Ltd sets March 12, 2026, as the record date for 4th interim dividend FY 2025-26.
Dividend payment, if declared, will occur within 30 days as per Companies Act provisions.

news.title:
Sun TV Network faced fines for SEBI non-compliance in Sep-Dec 2024 quarters.
Waiver applications submitted in Nov 2024 and Mar 2025; BSE approved in Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network faced fines for SEBI non-compliance in Sep-Dec 2024 quarters.
Waiver applications submitted in Nov 2024 and Mar 2025; BSE approved in Feb 2026.

news.title:
Sun TV Network shows robust revenue growth but faces declining profitability and returns in Dec 2025.
Investment grade downgraded to Sell due to negative financial trend despite mixed quarterly performance.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network shows robust revenue growth but faces declining profitability and returns in Dec 2025.
Investment grade downgraded to Sell due to negative financial trend despite mixed quarterly performance.

news.title:
Sun TV Network's Q2 results fell short, with EPS of 8.23 missing estimates by 19% and revenue of 8.6b 4.4% below forecasts.
Analysts maintain a stable consensus price target of 656, expecting slower growth at 1.0% CAGR vs. 5.5% historically and industry growth of 9.3%.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network's Q2 results fell short, with EPS of 8.23 missing estimates by 19% and revenue of 8.6b 4.4% below forecasts.
Analysts maintain a stable consensus price target of 656, expecting slower growth at 1.0% CAGR vs. 5.5% historically and industry growth of 9.3%.

news.title:
Sun TV rose 3.6% as IPL franchise valuation optimism outweighed weak Q3FY26 results.
Q3 revenue grew 4% YoY to ₹862.2 crore; net profit fell 10.7% YoY to ₹324 crore.
news.summary:
Sun TV rose 3.6% as IPL franchise valuation optimism outweighed weak Q3FY26 results.
Q3 revenue grew 4% YoY to ₹862.2 crore; net profit fell 10.7% YoY to ₹324 crore.

news.title:
Sun TV Network declared a dividend of ₹2.50/share with a 2.8% yield, above industry average.
EPS is forecast to grow 37.1% next year, but weak cash flows and unstable dividends raise sustainability concerns.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network declared a dividend of ₹2.50/share with a 2.8% yield, above industry average.
EPS is forecast to grow 37.1% next year, but weak cash flows and unstable dividends raise sustainability concerns.

news.title:
SunTV's Q3 net profit declines 10.7% to ₹324 crore; revenue rises 4% to ₹862 crore.
EBITDA decreases 5.6% to ₹419.6 crore; margin drops to 48.7% from 53.7% YoY.
news.summary:
SunTV's Q3 net profit declines 10.7% to ₹324 crore; revenue rises 4% to ₹862 crore.
EBITDA decreases 5.6% to ₹419.6 crore; margin drops to 48.7% from 53.7% YoY.

news.title:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.
news.summary:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.

news.title:
Sun TV Network Ltd's board to meet on Feb 6, 2026, to review Q3 FY25-26 financial results.
The board will also consider declaring and paying an interim dividend for FY25-26.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network Ltd's board to meet on Feb 6, 2026, to review Q3 FY25-26 financial results.
The board will also consider declaring and paying an interim dividend for FY25-26.

news.title:
Sun TV Network's ROCE has declined from 21% to 13% over five years, despite increased capital use.
Returns have fallen, and the stock gained only 38% in five years, reducing its multi-bagger potential.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network's ROCE has declined from 21% to 13% over five years, despite increased capital use.
Returns have fallen, and the stock gained only 38% in five years, reducing its multi-bagger potential.

news.title:
Sun TV Network's shares rose 3.6%, closing at ₹567 on 27 Nov.
The rise contrasts with its challenging long-term financial performance.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network's shares rose 3.6%, closing at ₹567 on 27 Nov.
The rise contrasts with its challenging long-term financial performance.

news.title:
ICICI Securities maintains 'Buy' on Sun TV, citing inexpensive valuations and a potential 29% upside.
Ad revenue fell 12.9% YoY in Q2 FY26; subscription revenue grew 9% YoY; Sun TV diversifies via Sunrisers Leeds acquisition.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities maintains 'Buy' on Sun TV, citing inexpensive valuations and a potential 29% upside.
Ad revenue fell 12.9% YoY in Q2 FY26; subscription revenue grew 9% YoY; Sun TV diversifies via Sunrisers Leeds acquisition.

news.title:
Sun TV Network's Q2 net profit declined to ₹3.54B from ₹4.1B YoY.
Revenue rose to ₹13B from ₹9.36B YoY; EBITDA grew to ₹7.84B, margin at 60.35%.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network's Q2 net profit declined to ₹3.54B from ₹4.1B YoY.
Revenue rose to ₹13B from ₹9.36B YoY; EBITDA grew to ₹7.84B, margin at 60.35%.

news.title:
Sun TV Network reported unaudited results for Q2 and H1 FY25, with total income of Rs. 2,737.6 cr and PAT of Rs. 858.4 cr.
The company declared an interim dividend of Rs. 3.75 per share and acquired Sunrisers Leeds Ltd for GBP 100.5 mn.
news.summary:
Sun TV Network reported unaudited results for Q2 and H1 FY25, with total income of Rs. 2,737.6 cr and PAT of Rs. 858.4 cr.
The company declared an interim dividend of Rs. 3.75 per share and acquired Sunrisers Leeds Ltd for GBP 100.5 mn.
